project.name: SylphxAI Actions
project.summary: Shared GitHub Actions repository for reusable, versioned action implementations consumed by SylphxAI repositories.

surfaces.name: Slack notify composite action
surfaces.description: Versioned composite action for sending Slack webhook notifications.

surfaces.name: GroundAtlas local control-plane gate
surfaces.description: Repository-local action-surface validation and GroundAtlas package dogfood gate.

surfaces.name: Project control plane
surfaces.description: Human project identity, boundary, lifecycle, and delivery entry point.

surfaces.name: Doctrine adapter manifest
surfaces.description: Sylphx Doctrine adapter and org-local governance catalog; not the vendor-neutral GroundAtlas default.

commands.name: test:action-surface
commands.purpose: Verify documented action paths exist and non-owned publish workflow paths are not advertised.

commands.name: groundatlas:fleet
commands.command: npm exec --yes --package groundatlas@0.1.3 -- ga update --out .groundatlas-pilot && npm exec --yes --package groundatlas@0.1.3 -- ga manifest --out .groundatlas-pilot --json && npm exec --yes --package groundatlas@0.1.3 -- ga audit --out .groundatlas-pilot && npm exec --yes --package groundatlas@0.1.3 -- ga fleet . --out .groundatlas-pilot --require-atlas --strict --json && npm exec --yes --package groundatlas@0.1.3 -- ga fleet . --out .groundatlas-pilot --require-atlas --strict
commands.purpose: Prove the vendor-neutral manifest is selected, .doctrine/project.json remains an adapter, and generated JSON plus Markdown GroundAtlas reports are navigation-only evidence.

adoption.notes: Vendor-neutral GroundAtlas manifest for package/action dogfooding. .doctrine/project.json remains the Sylphx Doctrine adapter and local governance catalog. Generated .groundatlas* reports are evidence/navigation only, not source of truth.
